# GHL Video

> GHL Video is the original HighLevel-only video studio: white-label videos for GoHighLevel SaaS businesses and agencies, produced fully in-house. A brand of Vidiosa LLC. 800+ HighLevel teams served, rated 5.0 on Google. Not affiliated with or endorsed by GoHighLevel Inc.

## Key pages

- [Premade Videos](https://ghlvideo.com/premade/): the white-label GoHighLevel video library, videos $495 to $995, bundles from $995
- [Video Bundles](https://ghlvideo.com/highlevel-video-bundle/): full-funnel white-label bundles
- [Demo Videos](https://ghlvideo.com/highlevel-demo-video/): branded HighLevel platform walkthroughs
- [Custom Production](https://ghlvideo.com/custom-video/): custom video from published starting prices, from $1,500
- [Video Editing](https://ghlvideo.com/editing/): monthly editing for HighLevel creators, plans from $595
- [About](https://ghlvideo.com/about/): the studio, the team, the company

## Facts

- Serves HighLevel SaaS resellers, agencies, and creators in the US, CA, UK, and AU
- Every video is white-label: client logo, dashboard theme, voiceover, full commercial rights
- In-house production team; nothing outsourced
- Premade delivery in 5 to 7 days
- GHL Video is a brand of Vidiosa LLC and is not affiliated with or endorsed by GoHighLevel Inc.
